deltas.releaseNoteText: SetDocumentsRequestOptions — New debounceTime and optimisticPermissions fields
deltas.summary: Document the new debounceTime and optimisticPermissions fields on SetDocumentsRequestOptions in the setDocuments() call pattern.

parameters.name: options.debounceTime
parameters.description: Controls the dynamic debounce interval (ms) for setDocuments() calls, replacing the fixed default. Relates to the bug fix 'Dynamic debounce for setDocuments()'.

parameters.name: options.optimisticPermissions
parameters.description: When true, applies permission changes optimistically before server confirmation.

deltas.ambiguityNote: The release note names the fields but does not specify the exact type of debounceTime (assumed number/ms based on the companion bug fix 'Dynamic debounce for setDocuments()') or the precise semantics of optimisticPermissions beyond its name. Agent-8 should document the fields as optional with descriptions derived from their names and the related bug fix entry, and flag for human review of exact types if the API reference confirms them.
